title: "Mac adress &#4323;&#4305;&#4323;&#4316;&#4322;&#4323;&#4310;&#4308;"
date: 2009-02-03
forum: Georgia Team
---

### Post by zuzujoto on 2009-02-03
&#4315;&#4317;&#4306;&#4308;&#4321;&#4304;&#4314;&#4315;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4311;. &#4315;&#4304;&#4325;&#4309;&#4321; &#4317;&#4320;&#4312; &#4313;&#4317;&#4315;&#4318;&#4312; &#4321;&#4304;&#4334;&#4314;&#4321;&#4328;&#4312;. &#4315;&#4317;&#4306;&#4308;&#4334;&#4321;&#4308;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;&#4311;, &#4317;&#4318;&#4322;&#4312;&#4313;&#4323;&#4320;&#4312; &#4312;&#4316;&#4322;&#4308;&#4320;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4312; &#4312;&#4311;&#4309;&#4304;&#4314;&#4312;&#4321;&#4332;&#4312;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4321; &#4308;&#4320;&#4311; &#4313;&#4317;&#4315;&#4318;&#4310;&#4308; &#4312;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4312;&#4321; &#4315;&#4312;&#4332;&#4317;&#4307;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;&#4321; (&#4311;&#4323; &#4315;&#4308;&#4317;&#4320;&#4308;&#4310;&#4308;&#4330; &#4306;&#4312;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304;, &#4311;&#4304;&#4316;&#4334;&#4304; &#4323;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304; &#4307;&#4304;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4322;&#4317;), &#4328;&#4308;&#4321;&#4304;&#4305;&#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4304;&#4307; &#4314;&#4304;&#4318;&#4322;&#4317;&#4318;&#4312; &#4312;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4312;&#4321; &#4306;&#4304;&#4320;&#4308;&#4328;&#4308;&#4304;. &#4304;&#4316;&#4323; &#4327;&#4317;&#4309;&#4308;&#4314; &#4307;&#4326;&#4308; &#4320;&#4317;&#4315; &#4304;&#4320; &#4309;&#4320;&#4308;&#4313;&#4317; &#4307;&#4304; &#4315;&#4304;&#4313; &#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4311;&#4312; &#4304;&#4320; &#4309;&#4304;&#4330;&#4309;&#4314;&#4308;&#4309;&#4312;&#4316;&#4317; &#4317;&#4318;&#4308;&#4320;&#4304;&#4322;&#4317;&#4320;&#4321; (&#4304;&#4315; &#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4311;&#4312;&#4321; &#4321;&#4304;&#4328;&#4323;&#4304;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4311; &#4306;&#4309;&#4304;&#4332;&#4317;&#4307;&#4308;&#4305;&#4308;&#4316; &#4312;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4321;) &#4315;&#4312;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304;, &#4320;&#4317;&#4315; &#4308;&#4320;&#4311;&#4312; &#4313;&#4317;&#4315;&#4318;&#4312;&#4321; &#4315;&#4304;&#4313;&#4312; &#4306;&#4304;&#4309;&#4323;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;&#4317; &#4315;&#4308;&#4317;&#4320;&#4308;&#4321;. &#4304;&#4316;&#4323; &#4328;&#4316;&#4323;&#4320;&#4321; &#4315;&#4308;&#4317;&#4320;&#4308;&#4328;&#4312; &#4311;&#4323; &#4328;&#4308;&#4309;&#4304;&#4308;&#4320;&#4311;&#4308;&#4305;, &#4312;&#4316;&#4322;&#4308;&#4320;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4312; &#4329;&#4304;&#4312;&#4320;&#4311;&#4317;&#4321;. &#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4311;&#4309;&#4312;&#4321; &#4309;&#4304;&#4313;&#4308;&#4311;&#4308;&#4305; &#4328;&#4308;&#4315;&#4307;&#4308;&#4306;&#4321;:
```
sudo ifconfig eth0 down
sudo ifconfig eth0 hw ether MAC_DRESS
sudo ifconfig eth0 up
```
&#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321; &#4315;&#4308;&#4320;&#4308;, &#4320;&#4317;&#4315; &#4309;&#4304;&#4331;&#4314;&#4308;&#4309; &#4305;&#4320;&#4331;&#4304;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;&#4321; ifconfig &#4315;&#4312;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;&#4321; &#4328;&#4308;&#4330;&#4309;&#4314;&#4312;&#4314; &#4315;&#4304;&#4313; &#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4311;&#4321;, &#4315;&#4304;&#4306;&#4320;&#4304;&#4315; &#4312;&#4316;&#4322;&#4308;&#4320;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4312; &#4315;&#4304;&#4312;&#4316;&#4330; &#4304;&#4320; &#4304;&#4320;&#4312;&#4321;. &#4309;&#4304;&#4334;&#4307;&#4308;&#4316; &#4306;&#4304;&#4307;&#4304;&#4322;&#4309;&#4312;&#4320;&#4311;&#4309;&#4304;&#4321;&#4304;&#4330; ```
sudo /etc/init.d/networking restart
```&#4315;&#4304;&#4306;&#4320;&#4304;&#4315; &#4304;&#4320; &#4328;&#4309;&#4308;&#4314;&#4312;&#4321;. &#4307;&#4304;&#4309;&#4304;&#4308;&#4307;&#4312;&#4322;&#4308; &#4308;&#4321; &#4324;&#4304;&#4312;&#4314;&#4312;&#4330; /etc/network/interfaces. &#4315;&#4317;&#4313;&#4314;&#4308;&#4307; &#4309;&#4308;&#4320;&#4304;&#4324;&#4308;&#4320;&#4312; &#4309;&#4323;&#4328;&#4309;&#4308;&#4314;&#4308; :(
&#4318;.&#4321;. &#4308;&#4321; &#4327;&#4309;&#4308;&#4314;&#4304;&#4324;&#4308;&#4320;&#4312; windows-&#4310;&#4308; &#4315;&#4317;&#4309;&#4304;&#4306;&#4309;&#4304;&#4320;&#4308;, &#4304;&#4316;&#4323; &#4315;&#4317;&#4306;&#4309;&#4304;&#4320;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;&#4307;&#4312;&#4304;...
&#4311;&#4323; &#4309;&#4312;&#4316;&#4315;&#4308;&#4321; &#4306;&#4325;&#4317;&#4316;&#4312;&#4304;&#4311; &#4315;&#4321;&#4306;&#4304;&#4309;&#4321;&#4312; &#4318;&#4320;&#4317;&#4305;&#4314;&#4308;&#4315;&#4304;, &#4312;&#4325;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305; &#4306;&#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4310;&#4312;&#4304;&#4320;&#4317;&#4311;?

---

### Post by alinux on 2009-02-03
&#4312;&#4321;&#4308; &#4308;&#4321; &#4320;&#4304; &#4321;&#4304;&#4328;&#4312;&#4316;&#4308;&#4314;&#4312; &#4315;&#4308;&#4311;&#4317;&#4307;&#4312;&#4304;... &#4304;&#4320; &#4315;&#4308;&#4306;&#4317;&#4316;&#4304; &#4311;&#4323; &#4304;&#4320;&#4321;&#4308;&#4305;&#4317;&#4305;&#4321; &#4304;&#4321;&#4308;&#4311;&#4312; &#4320;&#4304;&#4315;. (&#4329;&#4309;&#4308;&#4316;&#4328;&#4312; &#4320;&#4317; &#4307;&#4304;&#4320;&#4329;&#4308;&#4321;).

&#4304;&#4305;&#4304; &#4308;&#4321; &#4321;&#4330;&#4304;&#4307;&#4308;:
[http://www.howtogeek.com/howto/ubuntu/change-your-network-card-mac-address-on-ubuntu/](http://www.howtogeek.com/howto/ubuntu/change-your-network-card-mac-address-on-ubuntu/)


> **zuzujoto said:**
> &#4315;&#4317;&#4306;&#4308;&#4321;&#4304;&#4314;&#4315;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4311;. &#4315;&#4304;&#4325;&#4309;&#4321; &#4317;&#4320;&#4312; &#4313;&#4317;&#4315;&#4318;&#4312; &#4321;&#4304;&#4334;&#4314;&#4321;&#4328;&#4312;. &#4315;&#4317;&#4306;&#4308;&#4334;&#4321;&#4308;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;&#4311;, &#4317;&#4318;&#4322;&#4312;&#4313;&#4323;&#4320;&#4312; &#4312;&#4316;&#4322;&#4308;&#4320;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4312; &#4312;&#4311;&#4309;&#4304;&#4314;&#4312;&#4321;&#4332;&#4312;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4321; &#4308;&#4320;&#4311; &#4313;&#4317;&#4315;&#4318;&#4310;&#4308; &#4312;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4312;&#4321; &#4315;&#4312;&#4332;&#4317;&#4307;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;&#4321; (&#4311;&#4323; &#4315;&#4308;&#4317;&#4320;&#4308;&#4310;&#4308;&#4330; &#4306;&#4312;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304;, &#4311;&#4304;&#4316;&#4334;&#4304; &#4323;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304; &#4307;&#4304;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4322;&#4317;), &#4328;&#4308;&#4321;&#4304;&#4305;&#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4304;&#4307; &#4314;&#4304;&#4318;&#4322;&#4317;&#4318;&#4312; &#4312;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4312;&#4321; &#4306;&#4304;&#4320;&#4308;&#4328;&#4308;&#4304;. &#4304;&#4316;&#4323; &#4327;&#4317;&#4309;&#4308;&#4314; &#4307;&#4326;&#4308; &#4320;&#4317;&#4315; &#4304;&#4320; &#4309;&#4320;&#4308;&#4313;&#4317; &#4307;&#4304; &#4315;&#4304;&#4313; &#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4311;&#4312; &#4304;&#4320; &#4309;&#4304;&#4330;&#4309;&#4314;&#4308;&#4309;&#4312;&#4316;&#4317; &#4317;&#4318;&#4308;&#4320;&#4304;&#4322;&#4317;&#4320;&#4321; (&#4304;&#4315; &#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4311;&#4312;&#4321; &#4321;&#4304;&#4328;&#4323;&#4304;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4311; &#4306;&#4309;&#4304;&#4332;&#4317;&#4307;&#4308;&#4305;&#4308;&#4316; &#4312;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4321;) &#4315;&#4312;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304;, &#4320;&#4317;&#4315; &#4308;&#4320;&#4311;&#4312; &#4313;&#4317;&#4315;&#4318;&#4312;&#4321; &#4315;&#4304;&#4313;&#4312; &#4306;&#4304;&#4309;&#4323;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;&#4317; &#4315;&#4308;&#4317;&#4320;&#4308;&#4321;. &#4304;&#4316;&#4323; &#4328;&#4316;&#4323;&#4320;&#4321; &#4315;&#4308;&#4317;&#4320;&#4308;&#4328;&#4312; &#4311;&#4323; &#4328;&#4308;&#4309;&#4304;&#4308;&#4320;&#4311;&#4308;&#4305;, &#4312;&#4316;&#4322;&#4308;&#4320;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4312; &#4329;&#4304;&#4312;&#4320;&#4311;&#4317;&#4321;. &#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4311;&#4309;&#4312;&#4321; &#4309;&#4304;&#4313;&#4308;&#4311;&#4308;&#4305; &#4328;&#4308;&#4315;&#4307;&#4308;&#4306;&#4321;:
```
sudo ifconfig eth0 down
sudo ifconfig eth0 hw ether MAC_DRESS
sudo ifconfig eth0 up
```
&#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321; &#4315;&#4308;&#4320;&#4308;, &#4320;&#4317;&#4315; &#4309;&#4304;&#4331;&#4314;&#4308;&#4309; &#4305;&#4320;&#4331;&#4304;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;&#4321; ifconfig &#4315;&#4312;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;&#4321; &#4328;&#4308;&#4330;&#4309;&#4314;&#4312;&#4314; &#4315;&#4304;&#4313; &#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4311;&#4321;, &#4315;&#4304;&#4306;&#4320;&#4304;&#4315; &#4312;&#4316;&#4322;&#4308;&#4320;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4312; &#4315;&#4304;&#4312;&#4316;&#4330; &#4304;&#4320; &#4304;&#4320;&#4312;&#4321;. &#4309;&#4304;&#4334;&#4307;&#4308;&#4316; &#4306;&#4304;&#4307;&#4304;&#4322;&#4309;&#4312;&#4320;&#4311;&#4309;&#4304;&#4321;&#4304;&#4330; ```
sudo /etc/init.d/networking restart
```&#4315;&#4304;&#4306;&#4320;&#4304;&#4315; &#4304;&#4320; &#4328;&#4309;&#4308;&#4314;&#4312;&#4321;. &#4307;&#4304;&#4309;&#4304;&#4308;&#4307;&#4312;&#4322;&#4308; &#4308;&#4321; &#4324;&#4304;&#4312;&#4314;&#4312;&#4330; /etc/network/interfaces. &#4315;&#4317;&#4313;&#4314;&#4308;&#4307; &#4309;&#4308;&#4320;&#4304;&#4324;&#4308;&#4320;&#4312; &#4309;&#4323;&#4328;&#4309;&#4308;&#4314;&#4308; :(
&#4318;.&#4321;. &#4308;&#4321; &#4327;&#4309;&#4308;&#4314;&#4304;&#4324;&#4308;&#4320;&#4312; windows-&#4310;&#4308; &#4315;&#4317;&#4309;&#4304;&#4306;&#4309;&#4304;&#4320;&#4308;, &#4304;&#4316;&#4323; &#4315;&#4317;&#4306;&#4309;&#4304;&#4320;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;&#4307;&#4312;&#4304;...
&#4311;&#4323; &#4309;&#4312;&#4316;&#4315;&#4308;&#4321; &#4306;&#4325;&#4317;&#4316;&#4312;&#4304;&#4311; &#4315;&#4321;&#4306;&#4304;&#4309;&#4321;&#4312; &#4318;&#4320;&#4317;&#4305;&#4314;&#4308;&#4315;&#4304;, &#4312;&#4325;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305; &#4306;&#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4310;&#4312;&#4304;&#4320;&#4317;&#4311;?

### Post by joto on 2009-02-07
&#4328;&#4308;&#4309;&#4308;&#4328;&#4309;&#4312; &#4314;&#4304;&#4307;&#4317;, &#4320;&#4304;&#4330; &#4313;&#4312; &#4328;&#4308;&#4312;&#4331;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305;&#4317;&#4307;&#4304;, &#4327;&#4309;&#4308;&#4314;&#4304;&#4324;&#4308;&#4320;&#4312; &#4306;&#4304;&#4309;&#4304;&#4313;&#4308;&#4311;&#4308;, &#4304;&#4311;&#4304;&#4321;&#4316;&#4304;&#4312;&#4320;&#4312; &#4336;&#4304;&#4323;&#4322;&#4323;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312; &#4309;&#4316;&#4304;&#4334;&#4308;, &#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4304; &#4304;&#4320;&#4304;&#4317;. &#4304;&#4321;&#4308; &#4320;&#4317;&#4315; &#4314;&#4304;&#4318;&#4322;&#4317;&#4318;&#4310;&#4308; &#4312;&#4316;&#4308;&#4322;&#4312; &#4304;&#4320; &#4315;&#4304;&#4325;&#4309;&#4321;. &#4312;&#4325;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305; &#4315;&#4308;&#4320;&#4308; &#4309;&#4312;&#4316;&#4315;&#4308; &#4306;&#4304;&#4315;&#4317;&#4329;&#4316;&#4307;&#4308;&#4321; &#4307;&#4304; &#4307;&#4304;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;&#4317;&#4321; &#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321; &#4328;&#4308;&#4321;&#4304;&#4334;&#4308;&#4305; &#4310;&#4323;&#4321;&#4322;&#4304;&#4307;.
